title: Sirona Diagnostics: Best Diagnostic Centre in Mumbai | Prabhadevi | Dadar
description: Sirona Diagnostics is one of the best diagnostic & speciality clinic in Mumbai. We provide treatment services in the areas of cardiology, kidney, breast care, bones, etc. Contact us today!
text:
Sirona Diagnostics: Best Diagnostic Centre in Mumbai | Prabhadevi | Dadar Radiology Digital X-Ray Test Sonography Mammography Pathology Healthcare Packages Cardiology 2D Echo Stress Test ECG/EKG Test Specialty Clinics Cardiology Clinic Endocrinology Clinic Breast Clinic Fertility & Gynaec Clinic Gynecology Clinic Weight Loss Clinic Home Visits Memberships Home Home Slide 1 Super Fast, Reliable Pathology Quick home visits by our highly experienced phlebotomists. Get Smart Reports on WhatsApp and Email on the same day. BOOK NOW Slide 2 3D Sonography & Colour Doppler Monitor the progress of your baby or get complex Colour Doppler done; our high definition sonography machines and highly experienced doctors are here to get you reliable reports. BOOK NOW Slide 2 Mammography & Sono-mammo Our special breast imaging clinic is equipped with the best machines, experienced technicians and breast radiologist in the most comfortable environment. BOOK NOW Slide 4 Prevent or manage your diabetes Consult with our highly specialised, award winning Endocrinologist doctor to get the best possible diabetes care for even the most advanced and complex cases.  Avail of our end-to-end solution to prevent and manage diabetes and its complications. BOOK NOW Slide 5 Choose our 360-degree Cardiac Health Solution Cardiologists Consultations, Stress Test, 2D Echo, ECG, BP Monitoring, blood tests with cardiac markers – we have a full service cardiac clinic with Cardiologists from major Mumbai Hospitals. BOOK NOW Slide 6 Prevention is better than cure Safeguard your family’s health with our Full Body Health Checkups.  Free home blood collection, Sonography, X-ray & ECG tests. BOOK NOW Slide Slide Slide Slide Slide Slide Request a Callback SUBMIT At Home Lab Tests Prompt home visits for blood tests, ECG and X-ray. No more waiting on long booking calls! Sonography, Mammography & X-Ray State of the art radiology clinic with experienced doctors. Specialist Doctor Consultation Specialist doctors associated with top Mumbai hospitals – in our clinic without the hospital atmosphere and crowds. Full Body Health Check-up Choose from our wide range of blood tests, radiology & cardiology comprehensive packages at great prices. Bringing quality diagnostics and top doctors to your neighborhood since 2014 Sirona Diagnostics & Specialty Clinic is one of the best diagnostic centre in Mumbai that offers exceptional outpatient, diagnostic, and treatment services in the areas of Cardiology, Bone & Joint, Kidney and Breast Care. Patient First approach Instant appointments Hassle free home blood collection. ECG and X-ray available. Best in class machines and fully automated processes. Highly qualified radiologists and pathologists. Super specialist doctors available for easy appointments. Explore our Diagnostic Tests & Healthcare Packages Radiology Colour Doppler , Digital X-Ray Test , Sonography , Mammography Pathology Easy appointment booking, quick home visits, and reliable reports. Cardiology 2D Echo , Stress Test/TMT , ECG/EKG Test performed only by MD, DM cardiology – super specialist doctors Healthcare packages Check our range of comprehensive health packages Specialty Clinics Cardiology , Gynaecology , Endocrinology , Breast Clinics , and Weight Loss Clinic Home Visits Free home blood collection, X-ray & ECG tests Testimonials Anil Katara A premium medical diagnostic centre for the middle class people of Mumbai.
Strategically situated, highly qualified set of specialist doctors and staff who work at an efficient pace with a smiling face. They specialise in sonography and various other pathological diagnostic services. Nice, efficient and hardworking people. Shantaram Puthran Excellent service, all staffs members are very good.
Dr Vaishali P.Dangi consulting radiologist is experienced & co-operative. X-ray was also performed professionally and on-time. Shubham Agarwal Went there today was really happy with the staff and the technicians there. Came for the first time as I live nearby will get my reports done from here going forward. Jaydeep Palep It's a very well organised diagnostic centre. The service is good and prompt. Reports are reliable with good consultants and specialist doctors. Nidhi Khandelwal Fantastic lab, very well equipped, friendly and courteous staff! Great value for money. Sirona’s state of the art diagnostics along with its super specialist consultants are fast becoming the first port of call for many families. We at Sirona have made it a mission to be India’s leading Lifestyle disease management cum diagnostic company.
